case_title: JMW CARPET AND FLOORING, INC. VS. APPLIED SERVICES GROUP, LLC. ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED - (FEE FOR SERVICE: $125.00) SERVED MAR-01-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED SERVICES GROUP, LLC.
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 10/11/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,063.50 FILED BY JMW CARPET AND FLOORING, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT APPLIED SERVICES GROUP, LLC. DEPARTMENT OF VETERENS AFFAIRS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-27-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE:DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF JMW CARPET AND FLOORING, INC. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANTS APPLIED SERVICES GROUP, LLC AND DEPARTMENT OF VETERANS AFFAIRS. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2019. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY WITH A DEFECTIVE SERVICE(S). AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO JUL-31-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 FOR PROOF OF SERVICE(S). JUDGE JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JMW CARPET AND FLOORING, INC.
